name: Stir Fried Scallops & Apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Coarsely chop celery and slice scallops.
2. Peel and quarter apples.
3. Heat margarine in a heavy skillet over high heat.
4. Stir fry celery for 2 minutes.
5. Add scallops, sprinkling with juice from half the lemon.
6. Add apple pieces to the mixture, stirring constantly for another 2-3 minutes. If needed, add more margarine.
7. Sprinkle with juice from the remaining half of lemon and serve.
